raw.question: Patched semantics merge behavior to overwrite normalized incoming semantics
raw.chosen: Patched semantics merge behavior to overwrite normalized incoming semantics
raw.reasoning: Review correctly identified that workspace.ts clears semantics on write rather than preserving existing values when input normalizes to empty

events.content: Extended StorageAdapter with plain-data webhook envelope persistence helpers: Extended StorageAdapter with plain-data webhook envelope persistence helpers

raw.question: Extended StorageAdapter with plain-data webhook envelope persistence helpers
raw.chosen: Extended StorageAdapter with plain-data webhook envelope persistence helpers
raw.reasoning: webhooks.ts needs delivery-id dedupe and short-window coalescing, but queueing/retry semantics should stay outside @relayfile/core so the adapter boundary remains pure

retrospective.summary: Implemented relayfile-core webhooks and export modules with plain-data webhook envelope persistence hooks and a clean package build
